topics: Fundamentals of Fire Processes:- Elements of fire
Flammability limit dependence on temperature and pressure
Flammability diagram: Construction and application. Products of combustion: Flame
Fire Prevention Techniques:-Control of Ignition Sources: Electrical Area classification
controlling of static electricity: Methods to prevent electrostatic ignitions. Controlling oxygen levels: Limiting oxygen concentration
Inerting- Vacuum and pressure purging-Advantages and Disadvantages of the Various Pressure and Vacuum purging Procedures
Fire detection and fire alarm systems:-Fire detection- Need and importance of automatic fire detection system, principle of detection, classification of detectors
Heat detectors , Smoke detectors, Flame detectors, Flammable gas detection. Fire alarm system- classification of alarm system, Automatic alarm system, various components and modules
Principles of Fire Extinguishments:-Basic concept of fire fighting with water
halons. Classification of different types of fire fighting systems- Fixed and movable systems. Description
method of operation of different types of portable fire extinguishers-water type
CO2 type. Automatic water sprinkler system-Total flooding system
